title: Files Column in Item Mapping

posts.author: LeahACC (Leah Bechtold)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, everyone! Our team would love it if we could map the Files column over from one board to another (Move item to board automation) in order to keep the attached files with the mapped/moved items. Right now you can manually click and move an item to another board while keeping the attached file, but you cannot reproduce this in the “Move item to board” automation formulas. This would greatly improve our workflow and and published post management.

Thank you for considering!
